_comment: DEMO_MODE deterministic playback fixtures. Keys under 'generate' are a normalized signature of the request built as: fragments joined by '|', then '|', then context. Format: '<frag1>|<frag2>|...||<context>' (note the double '|' separating fragments from context; context is empty -> trailing empty). Keys under 'speak' are normalized text. Phase 8 fills real candidates / subgraphs / audio; values here are empty-but-correctly-shaped placeholders.

speak._comment: Chosen spoken line per demo input (the candidate the demo selects). data/prerender_demo.py synthesizes these into the audio cache so DEMO_MODE /speak serves them instantly.
speak.cold|window||: Could you close the window? I'm getting cold.
speak.tired|maybe||Mom, do you want to come fo: I'm a little tired, sweetie, so maybe.
speak.tired|maybe||Grandma, will you play with: I'm a bit tired, mijo, but maybe we can play.
